name: SaaS Landing
description: A conversion-focused product-marketing system: crisp neutrals, one confident indigo accent, and a full landing-page chain from navbar to footer. Built for SaaS launches, feature pages, and pricing.
whenToUse: Pick for marketing a digital product: SaaS landing pages, product launches, feature pages, pricing pages, developer tools, startup sites. The chain is a complete conversion narrative — sticky navbar, benefit-led hero, logo cloud for social proof, feature grid, customer testimonial, transparent pricing, closing CTA, footer. Crisp light neutrals with one confident indigo accent; reads as a product, not a brochure. Avoid for longform reading, portfolios, events, or dark dramatic presentations.
